svg.title: HelixTerminator — System Architecture
svg.desc: Draw.io architecture diagram. Open in diagrams.net or draw.io desktop for interactive view. File: 01_system_architecture.drawio

metadata.drawio-source:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <mxfile host="diagrams.net" modified="2026-06-28T00:00:00.000Z" agent="HelixTerminator Spec" version="21.0.0" type="device"> <diagram name="System Architecture" id="sys-arch-001"> <mxGraphModel dx="1800" dy="900" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="2200" pageHeight="1700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" />
<!-- ===== TITLE ===== --> <mxCell id="title" value="HelixTerminator — System Architecture" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="600" y="20" width="800" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== CLIENT LAYER ===== --> <mxCell id="clients-group" value="Client Applications" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="80" width="700" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flutter-desktop" value="Flutter Desktop
(macOS/Windows/Linux)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="clients-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="50" width="160" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flutter-mobile" value="Flutter Mobile
(iOS/Android)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="clients-group"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="50" width="160" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flutter-web" value="Flutter Web" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="clients-group"> <mxGeometry x="380" y="50" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cli-client" value="CLI Client
(Go)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="clients-group"> <mxGeometry x="540" y="50" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== API GATEWAY ===== --> <mxCell id="api-gateway-box" value="API Gateway & Ingress" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="250" width="700" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api-gateway" value="API Gateway
(gRPC + REST)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" vertex="1" parent="api-gateway-box"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="45" width="160" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rate-limiter" value="Rate Limiter
Service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" vertex="1" parent="api-gateway-box"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="45" width="160" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="load-balancer" value="Load Balancer
(Nginx/Envoy)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="api-gateway-box"> <mxGeometry x="380" y="45" width="160" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="websocket-gw" value="WebSocket
Gateway" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" vertex="1" parent="api-gateway-box"> <mxGeometry x="560" y="45" width="120" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== AUTH DOMAIN ===== --> <mxCell id="auth-domain" value="Auth & Identity Domain" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="420" width="700" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="auth-svc" value="Auth Service
(JWT/OAuth2)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" vertex="1" parent="auth-domain"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="50" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="identity-svc" value="Identity
Provider Service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" vertex="1" parent="auth-domain"> <mxGeometry x="180" y="50" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pki-svc" value="PKI Service
(Cert Authority)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" vertex="1" parent="auth-domain"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="50" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rbac-svc" value="RBAC Service
(Permissions)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" vertex="1" parent="auth-domain"> <mxGeometry x="500" y="50" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== SSH CORE DOMAIN ===== --> <mxCell id="ssh-domain" value="SSH Core Domain" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="780" y="420" width="700" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ssh-proxy" value="SSH Proxy
Service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="ssh-domain"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="50" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="session-mgr" value="Session Manager
Service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="ssh-domain"> <mxGeometry x="180" y="50" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="terminal-svc" value="Terminal
Service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="ssh-domain"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="50" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="port-forward" value="Port Forwarding
Service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="ssh-domain"> <mxGeometry x="500" y="50" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== VAULT DOMAIN ===== --> <mxCell id="vault-domain" value="Vault & Secrets Domain" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="780" y="250" width="700" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vault-svc" value="Vault Service
(Encryption)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="vault-domain"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="45" width="150" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="secrets-svc" value="Secrets
Manager" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="vault-domain"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="45" width="150" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="key-rotation" value="Key Rotation
Service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="vault-domain"> <mxGeometry x="360" y="45" width="150" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hsm-svc" value="HSM Interface
Service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="vault-domain"> <mxGeometry x="530" y="45" width="150" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== PLATFORM DOMAIN ===== --> <mxCell id="platform-domain" value="Platform Services Domain" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="600" width="1000" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="host-svc" value="Host Registry
Service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="platform-domain"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="50" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user-svc" value="User
Service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="platform-domain"> <mxGeometry x="170" y="50" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="org-svc" value="Organization
Service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="platform-domain"> <mxGeometry x="320" y="50" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="audit-svc" value="Audit Log
Service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="platform-domain"> <mxGeometry x="470" y="50" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="notification-svc" value="Notification
Service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="platform-domain"> <mxGeometry x="620" y="50" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="config-svc" value="Config
Service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="platform-domain"> <mxGeometry x="770" y="50" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="search-svc" value="Search
Service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="platform-domain"> <mxGeometry x="850" y="50" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== OPS DOMAIN ===== --> <mxCell id="ops-domain" value="Observability & Ops Domain" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1090" y="420" width="620" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="metrics-svc" value="Metrics
Collector" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="ops-domain"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="50" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tracing-svc" value="Distributed
Tracing" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="ops-domain"> <mxGeometry x="170" y="50" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="health-svc" value="Health Check
Service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="ops-domain"> <mxGeometry x="320" y="50" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="billing-svc" value="Billing
Service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="ops-domain"> <mxGeometry x="470" y="50" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== MESSAGE BROKERS ===== --> <mxCell id="brokers-group" value="Message Brokers" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="790" width="700" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kafka" value="Apache Kafka
(Event Streaming)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;size=10;" vertex="1" parent="brokers-group"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="45" width="180" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kafka-topics" value="Topics:
session.events
audit.events
user.events
host.events" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fffde7;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="brokers-group"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="40" width="180" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rabbitmq" value="RabbitMQ
(Task Queues)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;size=10;" vertex="1" parent="brokers-group"> <mxGeometry x="440" y="45" width="180" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rabbitmq-queues" value="Queues:
notifications
email
key-rotation" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fffde7;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="brokers-group"> <mxGeometry x="550" y="45" width="130" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== DATABASES ===== --> <mxCell id="db-group" value="Data Layer" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="780" y="790" width="940" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="postgres-main" value="PostgreSQL
(Primary — Users,
Orgs, Vault)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;size=10;" vertex="1" parent="db-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="40" width="160" height="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="postgres-sessions" value="PostgreSQL
(Sessions &
Audit Logs)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;size=10;" vertex="1" parent="db-group"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="40" width="160" height="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="redis-cache" value="Redis
(Cache &
Sessions)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;size=10;" vertex="1" parent="db-group"> <mxGeometry x="380" y="40" width="140" height="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="redis-pubsub" value="Redis
(Pub/Sub
Terminal)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;size=10;" vertex="1" parent="db-group"> <mxGeometry x="540" y="40" width="140" height="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="elasticsearch" value="Elasticsearch
(Search & Logs)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;size=10;" vertex="1" parent="db-group"> <mxGeometry x="700" y="40" width="140" height="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3-store" value="Object Storage
(S3 — Session
Recordings)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;size=10;" vertex="1" parent="db-group"> <mxGeometry x="860" y="40" width="60" height="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== TARGET SSH SERVERS ===== --> <mxCell id="target-group" value="Target Infrastructure" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1090" y="250" width="620" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ssh-linux" value="Linux Servers
(SSH)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="target-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="50" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ssh-network" value="Network Devices
(Cisco/Juniper)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="target-group"> <mxGeometry x="170" y="50" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ssh-containers" value="Kubernetes
Pod Exec" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="target-group"> <mxGeometry x="320" y="50" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ssh-bastion" value="Bastion
Hosts" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="target-group"> <mxGeometry x="470" y="50" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== CONNECTIONS ===== --> <!-- Clients → API Gateway --> <mxCell id="e1" value="HTTPS/WSS" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#9673a6;" edge="1" source="clients-group" target="api-gateway-box" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <!-- API Gateway → Auth Domain --> <mxCell id="e2" value="gRPC" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#b85450;" edge="1" source="api-gateway-box" target="auth-domain" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <!-- API Gateway → Vault Domain --> <mxCell id="e3" value="gRPC" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" edge="1" source="api-gateway-box" target="vault-domain" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <!-- Auth Domain → SSH Domain --> <mxCell id="e4" value="Verified Token" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#b85450;" edge="1" source="auth-domain" target="ssh-domain" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <!-- SSH Domain → Target Infra --> <mxCell id="e5" value="SSH/mTLS" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" edge="1" source="ssh-domain" target="target-group" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <!-- Platform Domain → Kafka --> <mxCell id="e6" value="Publish Events" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#d6b656;" edge="1" source="platform-domain" target="brokers-group" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <!-- Platform Domain → Databases --> <mxCell id="e7" value="Read/Write" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#82b366;" edge="1" source="platform-domain" target="db-group" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <!-- SSH Domain → Redis pub/sub --> <mxCell id="e8" value="Terminal Stream" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#82b366;" edge="1" source="ssh-domain" target="db-group" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <!-- Ops Domain monitoring --> <mxCell id="e9" value="Metrics/Traces" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#666666;" edge="1" source="ops-domain" target="db-group" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== LEGEND ===== --> <mxCell id="legend" value="Legend" style="swimlane;startSize=25;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="990" width="380" height="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg1" value="Microservice" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="legend"> <mxGeometry x="10" y="35" width="110" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg2" value="Database" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;size=7;" vertex="1" parent="legend"> <mxGeometry x="130" y="30" width="110" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg3" value="Message Broker" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;size=7;" vertex="1" parent="legend"> <mxGeometry x="250" y="30" width="110" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg4" value="Client App" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="legend"> <mxGeometry x="10" y="90" width="110" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg5" value="Security/Auth" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" vertex="1" parent="legend"> <mxGeometry x="130" y="90" width="110" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg6" value="Infrastructure" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="legend"> <mxGeometry x="250" y="90" width="110" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
</root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
